company.name: Briu
company.description: AI consultancy that deploys production agents and workflows for businesses. Transparent costs, no lock-in, agents run on your infrastructure with your API keys.
company.tagline: AI agents deployed for your business

services.name: Intro Call
services.description: 15-minute scoping call. No pitch, no prep required. Determine if agents make sense for your workflows.

services.name: Kickoff
services.description: 3-hour hands-on session: workflow mapping, live agent build, architecture plan. Includes 2-week pre-build research. You leave with one production agent and a roadmap for scaling.
deliverables: Workflow mapping to identify highest-value automation
One production agent deployed on your infrastructure

services.name: Workshop Add-on
services.description: Team-wide AI briefing added to Kickoff. Live demonstration of agent architecture, staff training, and day-to-day operation guidelines.

services.name: Implementation
services.description: Full agent build scoped from Kickoff. 4-8 weeks in 2-week sprints. Agents run on your infrastructure with your API keys.
deliverables: Team training on operation and extension

services.name: Retainer
services.description: Ongoing agent monitoring, optimization, model upgrades, and new capability deployment.

services.name: Speaking & Workshops
services.description: Keynotes, half-day workshops, and corporate programs with live demonstrations from production systems.

services.name: Nonprofit & Community
services.description: Significant discounts on all services for mission-driven organizations.

capabilities.name: Personal Assistants
capabilities.description: Email, calendar, contacts, daily briefings. Available 24/7 on WhatsApp, Slack, or Discord with human approval on sensitive actions.

capabilities.name: Email, CRM & Sales
capabilities.description: Triage inbound email, draft responses, update CRM, qualify leads, send outreach, schedule follow-ups. Nothing sends without approval.

capabilities.name: Reporting & Monitoring
capabilities.description: Automated reports, cost tracking, PDF generation and delivery. Daily summaries, weekly dashboards, cost alerts.

capabilities.name: Orchestration & Multi-Agent Systems
capabilities.description: Complex workflows across multiple agents with task completion, error rate monitoring, and cost controls.

differentiators: Agents run on your infrastructure with your API keys — no vendor lock-in
No margin on API or infrastructure costs — transparent pricing
Fixed prices for Kickoff; Implementation scoped and quoted before work starts
Operating cost as low as $2-5/day per agent

good_fit: Team willing to learn and participate in build process
At least one technical person available during build
Existing tools and data sources agents can connect to
not_a_fit: Highly unstructured creative workflows that change weekly
Need custom UI/UX or consumer-facing applications
Minimal team bandwidth or unwillingness to participate
